vocabulary.chinese: （be 的第一和第三人称单数过去式）
vocabulary.example_sentence: It was great! I climbed the Great Wall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 太棒了！我爬了长城。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It was great! I climbed the Great Wall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 太棒了！我爬了长城。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Yes, it is! It's 21,000 kilometres in all.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 是的！它全长两万一千公里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I visited the "Gingerbread House" last Saturday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我上周六参观了「姜饼屋」。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please send me some pictures.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请发一些照片给我。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I went to Xi'an with my family.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我和家人一起去了西安。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There are over seven thousand clay warriors and one hundred horses.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有七千多个陶俑和一百匹陶马。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There are over seven thousand clay warriors and one hundred horses.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有七千多个陶俑和一百匹陶马。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Then we went to see the Terracotta Warriors.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 然后我们去看了兵马俑。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Binbin and Xinxin went to the village nearby.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 斌斌和欣欣去了附近的村庄。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We ate some famous Xi'an noodles.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们吃了西安有名的面条。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sarah went to Wuhan. She ate hot dry noodles.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 萨拉去了武汉，她吃了热干面。

vocabulary.chinese: 做（某个动作）；带（过去式 took）
vocabulary.example_sentence: Amy took a trip to Shanghai.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 埃米去上海旅行了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The view from the tower was great!
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 从塔上看到的景色棒极了！

vocabulary.example_sentence: The stories were really inspiring.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这些故事真的很鼓舞人心。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We took many photos of the bamboo forest and beautiful waterfalls.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们拍了很多竹海和美丽瀑布的照片。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We tried delicious pumpkin soup and red rice in a nice restaurant too.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们还在一家不错的餐馆里品尝了美味的南瓜汤和红米饭。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We tried delicious pumpkin soup and red rice in a nice restaurant too.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们还在一家不错的餐馆里品尝了美味的南瓜汤和红米饭。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The Jinggang Mountains are only about 1.5 hours from the airport by bus.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 乘巴士从机场到井冈山大约只要 1.5 小时。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It's a beautiful train station in New Zealand.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 它是新西兰一座漂亮的火车站。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mike visited the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 迈克参观了港珠澳大桥。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Liu Jia's family travelled to Paris and visited the Eiffel Tower.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 刘佳一家去了巴黎，参观了埃菲尔铁塔。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Liu Jia's family travelled to Paris and visited the Eiffel Tower.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 刘佳一家去了巴黎，参观了埃菲尔铁塔。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Then we went to see the Terracotta Warriors.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 然后我们去看了兵马俑。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My trip to the Jinggangshan Revolution Museum was amazing!
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我去井冈山革命博物馆的旅行棒极了！

vocabulary.example_sentence: The volunteers told great stories about the Red Army.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 志愿者们讲了关于红军的精彩故事。
